title: WOMEN VETERANS HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH CARE SYSTEM WOMEN VETERANS HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Women Veterans Health Program provides a full range of medical and mental health care services, including treatment for military sexual trauma, substance abuse, PTSD, and domestic violence with additional programs for vocational rehabilitation and women veterans who are homeless. 3710 SW US Veterans Hospital Road Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Female veterans; call for specific eligibility requirements Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 273-5187 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Alternate (503) 273-5187 Program Manager Intake (503) 402-2852 Toll-free (800) 949-1004 ext 52852 Toll-free (855) 829-6636 Womens Veterans Call Center INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or for an appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: DD214, Photo ID, or other identifier of service. Also helpful to have documents to support claim or need. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Obstetrics/Gynecology * Veterans Sexual Assault Counseling * Military Sexual Trauma Victims Women's Health Centers * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - VETERAN AND MILITARY HOSPITAL MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY HOMELESS REINTEGRATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - VETERANS' JUSTICE OUTREACH PROGRAM MUTUAL SUPPORT - NATIVE AMERICAN SERVICES FOR VETERANS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH CARE SYSTEM
